import zipfile, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
with zipfile.ZipFile\('/Users/tobinelavathil/dev/video-editor-light/vacation_video_editor_spec.docx'\) as z:
    with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f:
        tree = ET.parse\(f\)
        root = tree.getroot\(\)
        ns = {'w': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'}
        texts = []
        for para in root.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}p'\):
            runs = [r.text for r in para.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}t'\) if r.text]
            if runs:
                texts.append\(''.join\(runs\)\)
        print\('\\n'.join\(texts\)\)
